# kvindo Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "kvindo" {
  token = var.kvindo_token
  # endpoint = "https://cloud-api.kvindo.com"  # optional, this is the default
}

variable "kvindo_token" {
  description = "Kvindo Cloud API token"
  type        = string
  sensitive   = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `endpoint` (String) API endpoint, defaults to https://cloud-api.kvindo.com
- `token` (String, Sensitive) API bearer token
